faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Travis, Staten Island?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in Travis typically costs between $350 and $650, depending on the size of your home, severity of the infestation, and number of treatments required. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work in Travis homes?
faqs.answer: Most Travis homeowners see significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours after treatment. Complete elimination typically takes 2-3 weeks as we target all life stages of fleas, including eggs and larvae. A follow-up treatment after 14 days is often recommended for severe infestations.

faqs.question: Are flea treatments safe for my pets and children in Travis?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved flea treatment products that are safe for pets and children when applied by our licensed professionals. We recommend keeping pets and family members away from treated areas for 2-4 hours until surfaces dry, and we provide specific safety instructions tailored to your household.

faqs.question: Do you offer same-day flea treatment service in Travis?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC offers same-day and emergency flea treatment services throughout Travis, Staten Island. We understand how quickly flea problems can escalate and prioritize urgent situations, especially for families with pets or young children experiencing bites.
